name: nimbus-bci
summary: Nimbus Personalizer: Bayesian personalization head for frozen neural EEG embeddings — wrap any encode(X)→Z trunk, adapt online, ship BrainState

        ================================================================================
        7. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
        ================================================================================
        
        The Software, including all algorithms, methods, designs, and
        implementations, is and remains the exclusive property of Nimbus BCI Inc.
        This Agreement does not transfer any ownership rights to you.
        
        The Software contains proprietary Bayesian inference algorithms
        including, but not limited to:
          - Bayesian Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA) with conjugate
            Normal-Inverse-Wishart priors and multivariate Student's-t posterior
            predictive;
          - Bayesian Quadratic Discriminant Analysis (QDA);
          - Polya-Gamma Variational Inference for Bayesian Softmax regression;
          - Structural Time Series (STS) classification via Extended Kalman
            Filter with persistent latent state;
          - Bayesian Active Learning by Disagreement (BALD) on the conjugate and
            variational posteriors;
          - Real-time streaming inference, online `partial_fit` updates, and
            label-free calibration-stopping methods.
        
        These algorithms constitute valuable trade secrets and copyrighted works
        of Nimbus BCI Inc.
